---
title: "Interests"
---

<br>

```{r out.width = "50%", fig.align = "center", echo = FALSE}
#knitr::include_graphics("Social.jpg")
```

<br>

## More about me

Outside of research, I enjoy traveling, photography, salsa dancing, and cheering for the Michigan Wolverines. I am also passionate about combining my academic interests with public good, including outreach efforts such as Girls Who Code and Statistics in the Community (Statcom).
